name: pre-release
description: Collect PASS or FAIL test conclusions, build Manifest-R through the locked product-release-gate kernel, and send PRERELEASE_REQUEST handoffs without Codex runtime dependence.

interface.shortDescription: Build Manifest-R and send PRERELEASE_REQUEST handoffs
interface.longDescription: Use one credential-free configuration across MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, and OS scheduler. Scheduled run_once only syncs SUBMISSION_GATE_PASS inputs and retries known unsent handoffs; explicit create-request owns PASS or FAIL input.
defaultPrompt: Run pre-release setup with zero manual JSON editing.
Sync pending SUBMISSION_GATE_PASS tasks from the submission mailbox.
List pending tasks and create one PRERELEASE_REQUEST.
Diagnose the OS scheduler and the locked product-release-gate binding.
